title: Generative Model Taxonomies
content:
# Generative Model Taxonomies

## 1. RMSNorm
$$\text{RMSNorm}(\mathbf{a}) = \frac{\mathbf{a}}{\sqrt{\frac{1}{d} \sum_{i=1}^d a_i^2 + \epsilon}} \odot \mathbf{g}$$

## 2. SwiGLU
$$\text{SwiGLU}(\mathbf{x}) = (\mathbf{x}\mathbf{W}_1 \odot \text{swish}(\mathbf{x}\mathbf{W}_2)) \mathbf{W}_3$$
